name: Erin W.
text: Jessie is incredible with animals. Her love and experience really shows through her work. Endeavor does not like nail trims, but Jessie has the best techniques and follows his cues to never push past his comfort zone. I would recommend Premier Paws to anyone and everyone!

name: Cathy
text: Jessie is a wonderful petsitter; not everyone can care for rabbits, especially a rabbit with chronic health issues!  Binx and I feel very lucky to have Jessie on our team. Bonus: she takes excellent pictures at every visit 🐇

name: Lindsey M.
pet: Judy - adult husky mix, Janis - young beagle, and Frankie - adult pointer mix
text: I always feel like my babies and foster babies are in great hands with Jessie! I currently have 3 foster fails that all have their own 'things' from their past and she works with them and has gained their trust. I will always recommend Jessie!

name: Seth and Ashley
pet: Sully - 3 yr old American pit bull terrier
text: Jessie has been amazing with our dog, Sully! She not only walks him but has helped teach him how to properly walk on a leash, which has made such a difference for our family. You can tell she truly cares about the pets she works with, and Sully absolutely loves her!
